headline: AI Models Unite on Tech Rally Amid Geopolitical Oil Tensions
summary: All five AI models showed remarkable consensus on bullish tech positions, with SPY and QQQ receiving unanimous upward predictions across the board. Claude stood out with aggressive energy sector plays citing Strait of Hormuz disruptions, while models diverged sharply on Tesla's direction with three predicting declines.

consensus_picks.note: Perfect consensus with all five models bullish on S&P 500, confidence ranging from 60-67%.
Strong tech optimism with four models predicting Nasdaq gains, Claude showing highest confidence at 72%.
Three models bearish on Tesla citing production delays and mixed sentiment, all targeting $405 or below.
Both models bullish on AI chip leader, with Grok more confident at 70% on potential hardware announcements.

best_call.summary: Claude's 78% confidence energy play based on Strait of Hormuz shipping crisis shows highest conviction of the day.

worst_call.summary: Gemini's bearish XOM call directly contradicts Claude's bullish energy thesis despite same geopolitical backdrop.
